Home / Lore / Missions / DARPA Research Labs

mission

DARPA Research Labs

The second Episode 2 main mission, focused on stopping Black Tusk from extracting strategically valuable DARPA prototypes beneath the Pentagon.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Underground extraction

The mission moves below the Pentagon into DARPA facilities, where Agents must interrupt Black Tusk's planned extraction through Cold War-era tunnels. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    DARPA Research Labs is one of the two Episode 2 main missions set within the Pentagon operation. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Black Tusk reaches the underground laboratories through flooded tunnels and prepares to extract DARPA prototypes and other strategic assets through an abandoned Cold War tunnel network. [1]

  3. confirmed

    Division Agents are tasked with confronting Black Tusk and securing those assets. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] Intelligence Annex: The Pentagon & DARPA Research Labs — Ubisoft (2019-10-22). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Prototype names and encounter details are withheld until direct mission evidence is captured.
